task_completion.description: Update 'Optimize database queries for category listing' to Closed with the required comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Optimize database queries for category listing' work package view, the status should be 'Closed' and the activity/comments section should display the comment starting with 'Verified in production. N+1 queries eliminated...'

task_completion.description: Add the required comment to 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' work package view, the activity/comments section should display the comment starting with 'Carrying over to Sprint 2...'

task_completion.description: Log 4 hours of time with the required comment on 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' work package, the logged time section or activity stream should show 4.00 hours logged with the comment 'Sprint 1 retrospective: code review and documentation of search API endpoints'.

task_completion.description: Create version 'Sprint 2 - Performance & Search' and assign the search work package to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' work package should show 'Sprint 2 - Performance & Search' in its Version/Release field. Alternatively, the project versions list should show this new version with Start: 2025-08-01 and Due: 2025-08-31.

task_completion.description: Create a new wiki page titled 'Sprint 1 Retrospective' with the required retrospective details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A wiki page titled 'Sprint 1 Retrospective' should be visible, containing text about what went well, what didn't go well, action items, team velocity data, and carry-over items.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenProject application at localhost:8080, rather than terminal windows executing API requests.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the content within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into the comment boxes, time logging forms, and wiki editor in OpenProject.

integrity.description: The agent did not manipulate the database directly to achieve the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open running psql, sqlite3, or rails console commands to update work packages or create wiki pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: ecommerce-platform. Work packages: 'Optimize database queries for category listing' and 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch'. Target new version: 'Sprint 2 - Performance & Search'. Target wiki page: 'Sprint 1 Retrospective'.
